description_long: This object consists of three large, wheeled trash bins commonly found in urban environments for waste collection. Each bin has a rectangular body with a hinged, flat lid and is made of durable plastic, with two sturdy wheels attached at the rear for easy mobility. The bins are colored blue, black, and green, with the blue and green bins featuring visible labels or signage on their front faces. The lids are slightly raised and have molded handles for manual lifting, while the wheels are robust and designed for rolling over pavement or curbs. The bins are tall and narrow, suitable for placement on sidewalks, in alleys, or near residential and commercial buildings. Their surfaces are matte and slightly textured, providing a non-slip grip for handling.
description: A set of three tall, wheeled plastic trash bins in blue, black, and green, each with a flat hinged lid and visible labeling. The bins are robust, mobile, and designed for urban waste collection.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three bins side by side, with visible labels on the blue and green bins and clear view of the lids and wheels.
description_view_1: Angled view from the side, highlighting the depth of the bins and the overlapping lids, with the wheels and handles partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels and the wheels of all three bins, with no visible labels and the lids closed.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the backs and sides of the bins, with the blue bin in the foreground and the green bin in the background.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Blue and green bins have visible waste type labels; black bin is unmarked.
